news.title: Polygon CEO announces job cuts amid Coinme acquisition

news.title: What do yall think is gonna happen with block 961,632
news.summary:
So on August 6th or 7th block 961,632 starts the bip110 locking. What do yall think is gonna happen? I think it will be a big nothing burger but I bet there is a small sell-off maybe to 55k. Are you taking any BTC off exchanges, just in case.
